ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling with modification.

PLAINTIFF BARRY GRAVES' MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complaint To Add Cause Of Action For Civil Penalties Pursuant To Paga.

Plaintiff Barry Graves Jr.'s motion to amend to add the PAGA claim is granted. (Labor Code section 2699.3(a)(2)(C) [amendment "as a matter of right."]. There is no trial date and the proposed amendment is timely. Defendant can raise its concerns regarding duplication, inconsistent judgments, etc. because there are presently overlapping PAGA actions by subsequent motion and cooperative case management.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
